objective: Comprehensive Cursor adapter hardening + release for opencodex. Harden all unknown-case throws, commit, test, bump version, merge dev to main, push, npm publish.

workPhases.title: Harden all unknown-case throws in Cursor adapter

tasks.title: Commit #116 interaction query fix to dev
Fix native-exec.ts unknown case throw (same pattern as #116)
Audit all cursor adapter files for remaining stream-killing throws

workPhases.title: Version bump, merge, push, and npm publish

criteria.scenario: All unknown-case throws in cursor adapter replaced with graceful handling
criteria.expectedEvidence: Only two stream-killing unknown-case throws existed (live-transport.ts planInteractionQueryReply and native-exec.ts handleCursorNativeExec). Both replaced with graceful returns.
criteria.capturedEvidence: live-transport.ts: throw replaced with graceful return (commit b1a1116). native-exec.ts: throw replaced with return [] + debugProviderDiagnostic (commit 7fe86b8). Audit confirmed all other cursor throws are internal type guards.

criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test passes all tests with 0 failures
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test tests/cursor-*.test.ts: 265 pass, 0 fail, 894 expect() calls, 30 files [1434ms]

criteria.scenario: Version bumped and merged to main
criteria.expectedEvidence: package.json version bumped, dev merged to main, pushed to origin
criteria.capturedEvidence: package.json 2.7.12 (commit 4037b3b). dev/main/preview all fast-forward merged and pushed.

criteria.expectedEvidence: Release workflow dispatched or bun run release executed
criteria.capturedEvidence: Release workflow 29231943368 succeeded: all steps green including Publish, Post-publish registry smoke, Create GitHub release. URL: https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/actions/runs/29231943368
